title: Spring the Discovery
subtitle: Unleash a discovered check to win the queen
summary: Your rook is lined up on the enemy king behind your knight. Move the knight with a threat and the check comes for free.

body.goal: Find the knight move that wins the queen, then convert against the engine.
body.successHint: Move the knight so the rook gives check AND the knight attacks the queen on h5 at the same time.
body.explain: Right. The knight moves with check (uncovering the rook on e8) and attacks the queen on h5 at the same time. The king must move first, then you take the queen.
body.wrong: A discovered check only wins material if the moving piece does damage too. Find the knight move that also hits the queen.

misplays.explain: Nc3+ is a discovered check, but the knight attacks nothing — Black just moves the king and keeps the queen. Pick the knight move that also hits h5.
